hero.title: Stop losing hours to errors you don't understand
hero.subtitle: Fixr uses AI to instantly explain and fix errors in any language. Paste the error in your browser, get the fix. In seconds, not hours.
hero.comingSoon: Web app now · CLI & IDE extensions coming soon

features.title: More than an error linter
features.subtitle: Fixr doesn't just surface errors — it explains them, fixes them, and teaches you why they happened.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you outgrow it.

free.name: Free
free.desc: For solo devs and occasional errors.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: For professional developers who ship daily.

team.name: Team
team.desc: For teams that need shared context and insights.
